Salesforce later shows the case moving to Resolved and then Closed, with resolution details referencing E-stop, Optisweep restart, restored AGV/hospital function, and follow-up on switch logs.
visual_evidence_summary: DOCX media screenshot retained as source evidence.

title: Customer-reported startup stall with no path to tippers
content: Salesforce case description reports that when the system was put to startup, everything was waiting, no path was shown, and nothing was coming up to the tippers. OCR contains AVG/ACD variants, but operational context indicates AGV/system startup symptoms.
visual_evidence_summary: DOCX media screenshot retained as source evidence.

content: The Salesforce resolution note states that after dialing into the system, the engineer saw the tipper heartbeat had failed in the same way as case 229716. This is a diagnostic recurrence statement, not a validated root cause claim.

content: Salesforce resolution details describe a coordinated recovery where the client put the master E-stop on while the engineer restarted Optisweep and paused/unpaused the tippers.
